query: architecture transition packaging distribution documentation completion

results.title: OMS API architecture docs scaffold
results.content: Created documentation set under docs/: README index, ARCHITECTURE.md, API_REFERENCE.md, DATABASE_AND_MIGRATIONS.md and linked all from root README. Docs describe clean architecture layers, module structure, runtime wiring, endpoint inventory, and migration conventions for users/roles/permissions/organizations.

results.title: Design docs: skill catalog and metadata-first graph
results.content: Added requirements/design docs for Dashboard skill CRUD and provider-agnostic Git import, and updated canonical architecture/planning docs to make GraphNode metadata-first with optional bounded reusable excerpts only. Files: docs/requirements/skill_management_and_graph_metadata.md, docs/design/skill_management_and_graph_metadata.md, docs/system-design.md, docs/plan/01-product-scope.md, docs/plan/02-architecture.md, docs/plan/03-data-model-and-tools.md, docs/plan/05-implementation-phases.md, docs/TASK_BREAKDOWN.md, docs/PROJECT_PROGRESS.md

results.title: Docs architecture source of truth cleanup
results.content: Consolidated Minder documentation so docs/system-design.md is the canonical architecture reference. Updated docs/PLAN.md, docs/plan/02-architecture.md, and the Phase 4 design docs to point back to system-design instead of duplicating full runtime topology. This keeps plan docs focused on sequencing and feature docs focused on their slice.

results.title: Minder plan translated and expanded
results.content: Translated docs/PLAN.md fully to English and expanded the architecture to include workflow governance, dashboard-configured process enforcement, repository-local state under .minder/, workflow planner node, workflow tools, repository context stores, and MCP-guided next-step orchestration for TDD-style delivery. Document version updated to 3.0 and marked ready for implementation review.

results.title: Docs refactor: split progress trackers by phase
results.content: Refactored monolithic docs/TASK_BREAKDOWN.md and docs/PROJECT_PROGRESS.md into an index + overview model. Added docs/progress/ with phase- and phase-part-specific markdown tables, each row linking to related requirements, design, architecture, or test docs to keep task context clean. Root docs now route readers into the relevant phase tracker instead of carrying the full backlog inline.
